manifest.name: Smart Linker

name: Smart Linker

releases.author: lemannrus
releases.description:
🎉 Smart Linker v0.1.1 — Initial Release

Smart Linker automatically finds and inserts semantically related notes using AI-powered embeddings.

✨ Features
Semantic Search — Finds related notes based on meaning, not just keywords
Managed Block — Inserts related links in a dedicated block at the end of your note
Vector Search Integration — Works with pre-computed embeddings from Vector Search plugin
Deduplication — Automatically handles chunked embeddings, showing only the best match per note
Configurable — Customize number of links, similarity threshold, excluded folders, and display format

🔧 Configuration Options
Top K results (1-20)
Similarity threshold (0.0-1.0)
Excluded folders
Custom block heading
Full path or note name display
Optional similarity scores

📋 Commands
Smart Linker: Update related links for current note
Smart Linker: Reload embeddings index

📦 Requirements
Vector Search plugin for generating embeddings
Ollama with nomic-embed-text model

🚀 Getting Started
Install Vector Search plugin and let it index your vault
Install Smart Linker
Set embeddings path to .obsidian/plugins/vector-search/data.json
Open a note and run "Update related links for current note"
